title: thymus quinquecostatus var. quinquecostatus
intro: Thymus quinquecostatus var. quinquecostatus, also known as the five-toothed thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant, a low-growing, woody perennial native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Thymus quinquecostatus var. quinquecostatus include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Thymus quinquecostatus var. quinquecostatus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
